title: dryopteris exstipellata
intro: Dryopteris exstipellata, also known as the autumn fern or dryopteris exstipellata, is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its deciduous fronds and unique growth habit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris exstipellata include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral activities. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it may also be dried and used as a powder or incorporated into herbal remedies.
